case_title: ROSE-MARIE FROID VS. ANTONIO AND RITA CASTELAUCCI TRUST ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF ROSE-MARIE FROID IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANTONIO AND RITA CASTELAUCCI TRUST IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAVID LARGOMARSINO PROPERTY MANAGER AGENT. DEFENDANT HOMEREALTY INVESTMENTS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAVID LARGOMARSINO PROPERTY MANAGER AGENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND SIGNED IT IN COURT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT HOMEREALTY INVESTMENTS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT ANTONIO AND RITA CASTELAUCCI TRUST
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY FROID, ROSE-MARIE AS TO DEFENDANT ANTONIO AND RITA CASTELAUCCI TRUST HOMEREALTY INVESTMENTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-01-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION OF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT SIGNED BY JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II FILED BY FROID, ROSE-MARIE ANTONIO AND RITA CASTELAUCCI TRUST HOMEREALTY INVESTMENTS
